title: swertia engleri var. woodii
intro: Swertia engleri var. woodii, also known as Wood's Swertia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The Swertia engleri var. woodii plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Swertia engleri var. woodii are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
